description_long: A round, baked pizza sits atop a dark wooden serving board with a handle, resembling a classic pizzeria presentation. The pizza features a golden-brown, hand-tossed crust with a slightly puffed edge and a visibly airy texture. The surface is generously covered with melted cheese, tomato sauce, and a variety of toppings including green bell pepper slices, tomato pieces, and scattered herbs. The cheese is lightly browned in spots, indicating it was baked to a perfect finish. The wooden board is circular with a distinct handle, making it easy to carry or serve. No packaging or branding is visible, and the pizza appears to be pre-sliced into several pieces.
description: A hand-tossed pizza with cheese, vegetables, and herbs sits on a dark wooden serving board with a handle. The pizza is golden-brown, pre-sliced, and visually appetizing.
description_view_0: The pizza is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the full round shape, toppings, and the handle of the wooden board extending to the right.
description_view_1: This view highlights the pizza's edge and the full length of the serving board's handle, with toppings and crust clearly visible.
description_view_2: The handle is most prominent in this view, with the pizza's toppings and crust edge in clear focus.
description_view_3: The pizza is shown from the opposite side, with the handle on the left and the toppings and crust still visible but the handle less emphasized.
